'''famutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylitone|xylitone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylitone|xylitone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| famutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæmitith|fæmitith]] || [[word:fæmitij|fæmitij]] || [[word:fæmitish|fæmitish]] || [[word:fæmiti|fæmiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:famumututh|famumututh]] || [[word:famumutuj|famumutuj]] || [[word:famumutush|famumutush]] || [[word:famumutu|famumutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:famututh|famututh]] || [[word:famutuj|famutuj]] || [[word:famutush|famutush]] || [[word:famutu|famutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:famuftuth|famuftuth]] || [[word:famuftuj|famuftuj]] || [[word:famuftush|famuftush]] || [[word:famuftuf|famuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:famututhu|famututhu]] || [[word:famutuju|famutuju]] || [[word:famutushu|famutushu]] || [[word:famutuku|famutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:famututh|famututh]] || [[word:famutuj|famutuj]] || [[word:famutush|famutush]] || [[word:famutu|famutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:famututhul|famututhul]] || [[word:famutujul|famutujul]] || [[word:famutushul|famutushul]] || [[word:famutukul|famutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:famututhuthu|famututhuthu]] || [[word:famutujuju|famutujuju]] || [[word:famutushushu|famutushushu]] || [[word:famutuku|famutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:famututhun|famututhun]] || [[word:famutujun|famutujun]] || [[word:famutushun|famutushun]] || [[word:famutukun|famutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:famututhuoro|famututhuoro]] || [[word:famutujuoro|famutujuoro]] || [[word:famutushuoro|famutushuoro]] || [[word:famutukuoro|famutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
